trans-unit.source: If you usually refund orders by changing their state, activate this option and choose the state you want to use to trigger refunds on Alma payments
trans-unit.target: If you usually refund orders by changing their state, activate this option and choose the state you want to use to trigger refunds on Alma payments

trans-unit.source: With Alma, you can make your refunds directly from your PrestaShop back-office. Go to your order to find the new Alma section. [1]More information on how to use it[/1].
trans-unit.target: With Alma, you can make your refunds directly from your PrestaShop back-office. Go to your order to find the new Alma section. [1]More information on how to use it[/1].
